title: Auto Slaying Deluxe
body:
# **Features:**


```
> Auto-slaying

> Break Protection

> Many Important Failsafes

> Sound Warning for Failsafes

> In-Game Push Notifications

> Session Timer & Kill Tracker

> Settings GUI

> Mouse un-grabber

> Toggleable HUD

> Mod Menu Integration (Optional)

And much more, join Discord for additional details
```
![Attack Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d226ade77b30e39547daecc402901aa9e1e8b91_0.webp)

## **Dependency**
- Fabric-Api

## **Tutorial**

Default Keybinds:

Auto-Slaying: K

Settings: O

Look at a mob, start the Auto Slaying.


> _More info can be found on the Discord!_

[![Discord](https://wsrv.nl/?url=discord.com/api/guilds/1399776902541213717/widget.png%3Fstyle%3Dbanner2&n=-1)](https://discord.gg/6HA4vSDz6q)

## **Disclaimer**

This mod is intended for educational and entertainment purposes only. By downloading and using Auto Slaying Deluxe, you acknowledge that the developers of this mod are not responsible for any misuse, violations of server rules, or consequences resulting from its use. Users are solely responsible for ensuring compliance with server policies, community guidelines, and applicable laws. Use at your own risk.
